headline: How Trump Accounts can turn $2K into $40K: Robinhood CEO & BNY CEO discuss
summary: Trump Accounts, the government-sponsored savings accounts for children, have officially launched. Bank of New York Mellon (BNY) CEO Robin Vince and Robinhood (HOOD) CEO Vlad Tenev sit down with Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Jennifer Schonberger to discuss the philosophy and benefits of the Trump Accounts program. Go to TrumpAccounts.gov or download the Trump Accounts mobile app to get your child's account started.
